scan_table_check.description: The input schema of an AI Agent describes the parameters that the orchestartor should use to execute a tool. The input schema is stored in a JSON string in the AI Agent Tool record. The JSON string must be valid, of course. If the input schema is not valid, this may prevent the AI Agent from working correctly.
scan_table_check.name: CodeSanity - AI Agent Tool Input Schema
scan_table_check.resolution_details: An invalid JSON string must be corrected.
scan_table_check.short_description: The input schema of an AI Agent Tool must be valid
scan_table_check.sys_name: CodeSanity - AI Agent Tool Input Schema
